top_signals.title: Nearly 80% of data center capacity is at elevated risk to climate hazards like flooding and fire, study says
top_signals.summary: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
top_signals.summary: Confira os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil com Patricia Xavier. Produção de Barbara Nascimento e Gisele Fernandes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: A solid start - first progress report on the 'One Europe, one Market' Roadmap
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 18 Jun 2026 Following the signature of the Joint Declaration on the EU legislative priorities for 2026 and of the One Europe, One Market Roadmap, the European Parliament, the Council and the Commission have worked closely together to effectively deliver on the identified priorities.
